title: Clans
description: Clans from ZDev is an advanced plugin for Minecraft that adds a full-fledged clan system with many features to the server
body:
Clans from ZDev is an advanced plugin for Minecraft (Paper 1.20.1) that adds a full—fledged clan system with many features to the server:

⒈ Clan Creation and Management:
Players can create their own clans, invite members, assign ranks, establish a clan house, and manage the internal structure.
⒉ Clan Menu:
A convenient interactive menu for managing the clan, viewing information, members, achievements, economy, and settings.
⒊ Wars and alliances:
The ability to declare wars on other clans, form alliances, and maintain diplomatic relations.
⒋ Economy:
Built-in clan balance system, support for integration with Vault to work with the server economy.
5 Flexible rights system:
All basic actions are protected by permissions, which allows you to flexibly configure access for players and groups.
